node.description: He is a young male student with a firm belief that UFOs and aliens exist. Upon meeting Momo Ayase and taking up on her challenge to see if ghosts were real, Okarun became cursed by a yokai known as the Turbo-Granny and seeks to return to normal.

After making friends with Ken Takakura, who she calls "Okarun" (due to refusing to call him by the same name as the actor she idolizes), Momo wishes to help restore his body back to normal after being cursed by a yokai and must overcome other paranormal activities that are involved.

__Relatives:__ [Father](https://anilist.co/character/349655/Aira-no-Chichi)

After becoming aware of the existence of the supernatural after collecting a mysterious golden ball, Aira proclaims herself as the "chosen one" that is on a mission to protect the world from evil and directs her attention towards [Momo Ayase](https://anilist.co/character/222594/Momo-Ayase), believing that she is a demon that has to be stopped after seeing her use her psychic powers. Aira revels in her social status as the popular girl at Kami High and strives to maintain her reputation. Outwardly, she appears sweet, innocent, and somewhat air headed. However, internally, she is far more vain and prideful, a side she only shows to people she becomes close with. Whilst antagonistic towards Momo, she harbors feelings towards her close friend [Okarun](https://anilist.co/character/222593/Ken-Takakura).

~!She later gains the powers of a powerful spirit named [Acrobatic Silky](https://anilist.co/character/245467/Acrobatic-Sarasara) and becomes allies / friends with Momo and Okarun, learning to be more mindful of her actions and being more open with her true self.!~
Miiko is the best friend and classmate of Momo Ayase and Kei in high school.
Serupo Seijin are an entirely male alien race who come from Planet Serpo.
Aira's former closest friend at high school.
Peeny-Weeny, also known as the Dover Demon, is a Dover Demon's Race, he works for the Serpo in order to earn money for [his son's](https://anilist.co/character/270706/) blood transfusion.
Aira's former closest friend at high school.

The son of the [Dover Demon](https://anilist.co/character/270705/Penny-Chinkosu), also known as the Mantisian. He needed to ingest new blood every day, but his life was saved thanks to [Seiko](https://anilist.co/character/234824/Seiko-Ayase) and crew giving them a cow. Currently lives on Earth with his father.
Nessie, also called Kamissie by Okarun since the creature had previously arrived in Kamikoshi City, was a cryptid and a disgruntled subordinate of the Serpod.
Momo Ayase's grandmother. Despite being a grandmother, Seiko possesses a youthful appearance that does not match her age and is recognized as being quite beautiful.

Acrobatic Silky took on the form of a tall woman with long silky black hair. She had a narrow face with hollowed eyes, wrinkles on the upper half of her face, and a permanent lipstick smile that exposes her teeth. She walked around barefooted while wearing a red wide brimmed hat and a red dress.
Taro is an anthropomorphized anatomical model that resides at Ayase's and Takakura's school.
Furattouzzu Monsutaa was an alien that was first sighted in the American town of Flatwoods.

Jin Enjouji is [Momo Ayase](https://anilist.co/character/222594/Momo-Ayase)'s childhood friend and first crush. After his parents were hospitalized as a result of his house being haunted, Enjouji moved in with Momo and [Seiko](https://anilist.co/character/234824/Seiko-Ayase) and transferred over to Momo's school. 

Jiji comes off as being a very hyper-active young man who likes to express himself with dramatic mannerisms and expressions. He also has a habit of usually ending his sentences with strange verbal tics and is known to be very athletic and enjoy sports, primarily soccer. Past his initial over-the-top presentation, Jiji is a good-natured guy who deeply values his friendships and is committed to protecting those close to him, striving to improve himself and act as a reliable ally in moments of danger. Despite his immaturity, Jiji demonstrates a strong sense of accountability and empathy. 

~!He later gets possessed by a mountain yokai called [the Evil Eye](https://anilist.co/character/309809/Jashi). Thus, whenever he touches cold water, Evil Eye comes out, and when he touches hot water, he is himself.!~
Jibakurei Kani is an earthbound spirit that was previously bound to a tunnel in Shono City.
Hana is an anthropomorphized anatomical model that resides with Ayase and Seiko.

The yokai took on the form of a very elderly woman with long white shaggy hair and eyes that were stuck looking to the sides. When possessing her targets, she has her victims transform into a mirror image of herself, albeit with a large mouth with teeth that is capable of biting off body parts.

~!After having her consciousness extracted from Okarun, the Turbo-Granny is forced to inhabit a maneki-neko doll.!~
Best friend and classmate of Momo Ayase and Miko in high school.
